scripts.cf:d1:migrate:test: wrangler d1 migrations apply qahal-db-test --remote --env "" --config wrangler.toml
scripts.cf:d1:migrate:prod: wrangler d1 migrations apply qahal-db-prod --remote --env production --config wrangler.toml
scripts.cf:secret:bot:test: [ -n "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN_TEST" ] && printf '%s' "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN_TEST" | wrangler secret put TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN --env "" --config wrangler.toml || (echo 'Missing TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN_TEST in .env' && exit 1)
scripts.cf:secret:bot:prod: [ -n "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN_PROD" ] && printf '%s' "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN_PROD" | wrangler secret put TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN --env production --config wrangler.toml || (echo 'Missing TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN_PROD in .env' && exit 1)
scripts.cf:secret:initdata:test: [ -n "$INITDATA_MAX_AGE_SECONDS_TEST" ] && printf '%s' "$INITDATA_MAX_AGE_SECONDS_TEST" | wrangler secret put INITDATA_MAX_AGE_SECONDS --env "" --config wrangler.toml || (echo 'Missing INITDATA_MAX_AGE_SECONDS_TEST in .env' && exit 1)
scripts.cf:secret:initdata:prod: [ -n "$INITDATA_MAX_AGE_SECONDS_PROD" ] && printf '%s' "$INITDATA_MAX_AGE_SECONDS_PROD" | wrangler secret put INITDATA_MAX_AGE_SECONDS --env production --config wrangler.toml || (echo 'Missing INITDATA_MAX_AGE_SECONDS_PROD in .env' && exit 1)
